_comment: Manual additions to the auto-detected top-25 list. PR-able. Each entry is a pool address; the program is auto-detected. The auto-list itself is sourced from SolanaCompass top-25 by TVL on initial backfill, then refreshed each ingest.
_format: { pool_address: string, note?: string, requested_by?: string, requested_at?: ISO8601 }
